findings.description: Layout of the central diagram and annotations completely transformed.
findings.evidence: The PDF features a central graphic of a tag flanked by text annotations on the left and right, connected by pointing arrows. The HTML completely abandons this spatial layout and reorganizes the content into a standard two-column table.

findings.description: Main diagram graphic and arrows are missing.
findings.evidence: The visual diagram of the physical shellstock tag (borders, layout within the tag) and the arrows pointing from the annotations to the tag elements are absent in the HTML.
